events.name: Diplomatic Summit
events.desc: The $theOtherFaction and the $faction have met $onOrAt $market to discuss relations. After a positive meeting, $theOtherFaction announces a deal to supply antimatter fuel to $TheFaction.

events.name: Collision in Space
events.desc: $theOtherFaction has furiously accused $TheFaction of conducting unsafe maneuvers after warships from both sides came into close proximity. While $TheFaction claims the $theOtherFaction provoked them, reports indicate that injuries were sustained by crew on ships belonging to the $theOtherFaction.
